pokemon:sobble.name: Sobble
pokemon:sobble.summary: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.
When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

pokemon:inteleon.name: Inteleon
pokemon:inteleon.summary: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.
It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.

pokemon:drizzile.name: Drizzile
pokemon:drizzile.summary: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.
A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.
